data.content: Implementation review rejected: (1) The reported printf error is at /Users/cartine/.local/bin/foolery:110 — the installed launcher script generated by install.sh. install.sh already has the fix (printf '%s' '->'). The PR only fixes setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh, which are not the source of the reported error. (2) Branch contains unrelated feature work (Refine Scope button). (3) The regression test is good but doesn't address the root cause. Next step: investigate why the upgrade path doesn't regenerate the launcher, or confirm this is simply a stale install.
